assignments.name: brand_voice
assignments.value: Tech-savvy, slightly irreverent, helpful. We love open source and privacy.

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'llama3:8b', prompt: 'Generate social media content for the topic: "' + $json.topic + '"

Brand voice: ' + $json.brand_voice + '
Target audience: ' + $json.target_audience + '

Return ONLY valid JSON with this structure:
{
  "twitter": "Tweet (max 280 chars, include 2-3 relevant hashtags)",
  "linkedin": "LinkedIn post (3-4 paragraphs, professional tone, include hashtags)",
  "reddit_title": "Reddit post title (engaging, not clickbait)",
  "reddit_body": "Reddit post body (informative, genuine value, no hard sell)",
  "instagram_caption": "Instagram caption (engaging, with emoji, 5-10 hashtags at end)"
}', stream: false, options: { temperature: 0.7, num_predict: 2000 } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'llama3:8b', prompt: 'Review this social media content for quality. Check for:
1. Grammar and spelling errors
2. Tone consistency with brand voice
3. Platform-appropriate formatting
4. Hashtag relevance

Content:
Twitter: ' + $json.twitter + '
LinkedIn: ' + $json.linkedin + '
Reddit: ' + $json.reddit_title + ' — ' + $json.reddit_body + '
Instagram: ' + $json.instagram_caption + '

If any issues found, return corrected versions as JSON (same structure). If all good, return the same content. Return ONLY JSON.', stream: false, options: { temperature: 0.2, num_predict: 2000 } }) }}
